posts.author: lpickersgill (Lewis Mark Pickersgill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I’ve used the native integration within Jotform to pass form submissions into a monday.com board. Strangely this is working for several integrations but will not work in 1 particular board. Jotform themselves are unable to diagnose the issue. The Jotform integration builder can recognise the Monday board as it is finding the column references.

Can anyone help?

Thanks

Lewis
